title: More Recipes And Melting
description: This project add more recipes and melting in minecraft
body:
We add more recipes and melting in minecraft, \
Input: Water / Water Bottle → Output: \
Input: Sugar Cane / Sugar → Output: \
Input: Sapling → Output: Bush \
Input: Rotten Flesh → Output: Leather \
Input: Nether Wart Block → Output: Nether Wart \
Input: Crying Obsidian → Output: Obsidian ×1 + Amethyst Shard ×4 \
Input: Bell → Output: Stick ×3 + Gold Ingot ×5 \
......and many other interesting things \
原料：水 / 水瓶 → 产物 \
原料：甘蔗 / 糖 → 产物 \
原料：树苗 → 产物：灌木 \
原料：腐肉 → 产物：皮革 \
原料：下界疣块 → 产物：下界疣 \
原料：哭泣的黑曜石 → 产物：黑曜石 ×1 + 紫水晶碎片 ×4 \
原料：钟 → 产物：木棍 ×3 + 黄金 ×5 \
......和许多其他有趣的东西
